name: Crockpot Chicken & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice mushrooms.
2. Remove skin from chicken pieces.
3. Brown mushrooms, onions, and chicken in a skillet over medium heat for about 15 minutes.
4. Stir in chicken bouillon, poultry seasoning, and salt.
5. Transfer the mixture to the crockpot.
6. Start the crockpot on LOW.
7. When ingredients are heated through, add rice and cook until done.
